description: SFX library manifest. Each entry maps to a file in public/audio/sfx/{category}/. Generated and curated via scripts/generate-sfx.js.

minimal.description: Scene cuts + hero entries only (~4-6 cues for 20s ad)

normal.description: Adds headlines, CTA, first stat (~8-12 cues). Default.

detailed.description: Adds wipes, secondary text, stagger firsts (~15-20 cues)
